name: reading-log
title: Reading log (Note Type)
description: A note template for a reading log: a star rating from meta, a formatted finish date, and a summary slot.

slots.header:
Reading Log

[conditional path="rating" not-empty="true"]

Rating: [meta path="rating"] / 5

[else]

Unrated

[/conditional]
slots.sidebar:
Finished: [meta path="finished" default="in progress"]

Logged [property path="CreatedAt" format="date"]
